notes: Keys can be Printify product IDs (recommended) or exact current product titles.
For each product, provide the new premium title and full description.
Description template hints: Style + Fit + Color + Scene + Frictionless closing CTA.

descriptionTemplate.style: Streetwear vibe and core aesthetic in 1-2 lines.
descriptionTemplate.scene: Where/when to wear it (day-night, city, gym, travel).
descriptionTemplate.closing: Low-friction close with confidence and urgency.
descriptionTemplate.example: Built for clean daily rotation. Relaxed fit with premium comfort. Designed in jet black to pair with cargos, denim, or shorts. From coffee runs to late-night city moves. Add to cart now and lock your size before it sells out.

6a0bbc590aaaeee12503546b.title: Slow Hours Oversized Tee — Black
6a0bbc590aaaeee12503546b.description: Made for the slow hours — late light, low rooms, conversation that doesn't need to be loud. Slightly oversized cut with a clean dropped shoulder; heavyweight cotton with a premium hand-feel, substantial enough to lean into. Designed in deep black to pair with washed denim, cargos, or stacked black-on-black. One of the pieces the Drip Street Set reaches for when the evening matters but the look shouldn't try too hard. 30-day returns at dripstreetshop.com — lock your size before the black sells through.

6a0a42d8992c1003070edc8d.title: Quiet Edge Oversized Tee — Black
6a0a42d8992c1003070edc8d.description: Built for the moments between — when the day's noise hasn't started and the mind has space. A true oversized cut with relaxed shoulders; heavyweight cotton with structured drape. In deep black for restraint days, with olive and white waiting for lighter rotations. The kind of tee modern urban fashion was supposed to be — quiet, considered, never reaching. 30-day returns at dripstreetshop.com. Size up if you want extra slouch.

6a0a3f1deeb1cc67a7083bd3.title: Shoreline Classic Tank — Sport Grey
6a0a3f1deeb1cc67a7083bd3.description: For the days the city softens — sun on stone, a long walk that takes longer than it should, no destination required. Classic fit with clean armholes and a settled hem, easy to layer, easier to throw on alone. Sport grey carries the light well; white pairs with anything denim-adjacent. Belongs in the Drip Street Set summer rotation. 30-day returns at dripstreetshop.com — pick your shade before the run thins.

6a0a125f69ddd35f850ebbc4.title: Left Bank Relaxed Tee — Black
6a0a125f69ddd35f850ebbc4.description: There's a way the light falls in a quiet quarter of Paris — soft, unhurried, slightly conspiratorial. This is the tee for that mood, exported. Relaxed fit through the body and shoulder; heavyweight cotton with a premium hand-feel that drapes without losing shape. Available across a soft palette — black, cornsilk, natural, sand, white — built to slot into rotations that lean tonal. Modern urban fashion that doesn't need to introduce itself. 30-day returns at dripstreetshop.com.

6a0a0b3ea378e1f01d037808.title: Open Statement Tee — Black
6a0a0b3ea378e1f01d037808.description: A tee that speaks lowercase — present but never raised, the way the best graphic pieces work. Clean cut with a considered shape, true to size, with heavyweight cotton that sits cleanly across the shoulder. Comes in deep black for grounded fits, natural for warmer afternoons, and white when nothing else will do. One of the pieces the Drip Street Set wears when the day calls for a single decision and nothing more. 30-day returns at dripstreetshop.com — pick the color that speaks first.

6a0a03eb5ad54e2a950411d6.title: Coastline Evening Tee — Old Gold
6a0a03eb5ad54e2a950411d6.description: Cut for the slow part of the evening — when the sun pulls low, the wind warms, and the day settles into its long ending. An easy, settled cut, true to size, in heavyweight cotton with a soft hand. Old gold carries the warmth of the moment; black, sand, and white hold their own once the light shifts. Sits high in the Drip Street Set summer-to-fall rotation. 30-day returns at dripstreetshop.com — find your colorway before the run thins.

6a09eed8c082c08abb0d39fe.title: Skyline Classic Tee — Cherry Red
6a09eed8c082c08abb0d39fe.description: What the city sounds like at altitude — the soft drone of traffic, distant brake light, the kind of energy you can lean into without raising your voice. Classic fit with a clean line through the chest; heavyweight cotton with structured weight. Cherry red runs hot; cornsilk, dark heather, sand, and white hold the quieter end. Modern urban fashion built for the parts of the city that move without explaining themselves. 30-day returns at dripstreetshop.com.

6a09ad8feeb1cc67a707f51e.title: Studio Hours Oversized Tee — Black
6a09ad8feeb1cc67a707f51e.description: Built for the hours when no one's watching and the work gets done — late, low light, a second cup, the right idea finally arriving. Slightly oversized fit with a clean shoulder and a hem that lands easy. Black for the focus; ice grey and natural for daylight transitions; tan and white for the lighter end. One of the Drip Street Set's quiet favorites — earned, never announced. 30-day returns at dripstreetshop.com.

6a08bc0e926fddf1760672c4.title: Sand Drift Tee — Sand Dune
6a08bc0e926fddf1760672c4.description: Pulled from the calm end of the coast — the part where the houses are weathered, the salt's in the air, and the wind doesn't bother announcing itself. A clean retail fit, sits true to size, heavyweight cotton with a premium hand-feel. Available across a coastal palette — sand dune, vintage white, tan, autumn, and more — built to layer or stand alone. Modern urban fashion with the volume turned down. 30-day returns at dripstreetshop.com.

6a08b463e9a2c5fcc60a6ffb.title: Everyday Standard Hoodie — Heather Navy
6a08b463e9a2c5fcc60a6ffb.description: The hoodie the rotation orbits around — warm, structured, built to take the season without complaint. Unisex fit with a clean drop through the shoulder and a hem that holds. Heather navy keeps things grounded; maroon, military green, ash, sand, and the rest cover the rest of the year. One of the few pieces the Drip Street Set buys in two colors. 30-day returns at dripstreetshop.com — pick your weight before the cool months hit.

6a08b3791c0731234c0976f7.title: Late Hours Lightweight Tee
6a08b3791c0731234c0976f7.description: For the small hours and quieter cravings — the long walks home, the late conversations, the parts of the day that don't get photographed. Softly structured and lightweight, with a cut that wears closer to true. The widest palette in the collection — from grounded blacks and charcoals through the full color spectrum — built for anyone who likes a piece that fits the mood instead of the rule. Everyday premium at its most flexible. 30-day returns at dripstreetshop.com.
